name: ephemeral-rooms
description: A real-time chat application with ephemeral rooms, built with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and Socket.IO.
author: Benjamin Rivas <benjaminrivas500@gmail.com>

scripts.dev:runtime: concurrently --names "web,server" "npm run dev --workspace web" "npm run dev --workspace server"
scripts.dev:libs: concurrently --names "shared,infra,application" "npm run dev --workspace shared" "npm run dev --workspace infra" "npm run dev --workspace application"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace shared && npm run build --workspace application && npm run build --workspace infra && npm run build --workspace web && npm run build --workspace server
scripts.start: concurrently --names "web,server" "npm run start --workspace web" "npm run start --workspace server"
scripts.prod:web: npm run build --workspace shared && npm run build --workspace application && npm run build --workspace infra && npm run build --workspace web
